INTEL
=====
📌A new Group emerged with Data Leaks named themselves "D1R" which indicates Command for File Listing
📌DLS running with Apache/2.4.58 (Unix) OpenSSL/1.1.1w PHP/8.2.12 mod_perl/2.0.12 Perl/v5.34.1
📌Listed 3 victims namely: Synopsys, ARM and Bosch
📌The claimed victims are not fresh, though they have been listed by other groups like LockBit, Arkana Security earlier
📌In July, I exposed their DLS IP which is hosted with TierPoint, US.
